proposed_domain: Hopi kachina ritual (masked dancer's personal identity is RITUALLY DISPLACED by the kachina spirit while the mask is worn; the substitution is a discrete on/off transition tied to the mask)

closest_prior_match.verdict: CLOSE — hood is sensory-input masking; kachina is identity-displacement. Different mechanism class.

decision: ACCEPT-WITH-CAVEAT — mask overlap noted; mechanism class differs.
